name: federated-ops-console
description: Federated Ops Console - a Module Federation reference architecture: a host shell dynamically loads an independently built and deployed operations remote at runtime.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/operations-remote && npm run build --workspace=apps/shell
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n remote,shell -c blue,green "npm run start --workspace=apps/operations-remote" "npm run start --workspace=apps/shell"
scripts.dev:rsbuild: concurrently -k -n remote,shell -c blue,green "npm run dev:rsbuild --workspace=apps/operations-remote" "npm run dev:rsbuild --workspace=apps/shell"
